title: Prettier Sheep
body:
**Prettier Sheep remodels the vanilla minecraft sheep and adds more variants! There are also specific variants for different biomes.**

These include:
- Temperate Sheep
- Warm Sheep
- Cold Sheep
- Mountain Sheep

modded biomes can manually be added for the variant types by adding them in the cow.properties file in **prettier-sheep>assets>minecraft>optifine>random>sheep** folder

Also check out my other packs:
- [Prettier Horses](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-horses)
- [Prettier Cows](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-cows)
- [Prettier Parrots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-parrots)
  
**Important!!**
This pack required Optifine or [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures/versions) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions) to work!!
